## Scope

Describe the scholarly or deployment-facing purpose of this change.

## Affected Record

- Work/page/file:
- Version or date, if applicable:
- Citation or DOI affected:

## Verification

- [ ] Public links still resolve.
- [ ] Citation metadata remains consistent across landing pages, `preprints/`, `sources/`, `llms.txt`, `CITATION.cff`, and `feed.xml` where applicable.
- [ ] `npm.cmd run backend:check` was run if this touches Worker code, downloads, headers, redirects, metadata, or public discoverability files.
- [ ] Mathematical or interpretive claims are supported by the relevant manuscript location or an external citation.
